meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no version control (Advanced Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no version control. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Template: Solve Version Control for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Stop losing code. Use the Antigravity project template to implement rigorous version control and ship faster with Claude Code. Master advanced AI workflows.
content.answer_block: The lack of version control is a silent project killer. By implementing the Antigravity project template, you establish a deterministic state for every build. Combined with Claude Code, you automate Git commits, branch management, and deployment, ensuring your freelance projects remain audit-ready, recoverable, and professional from day one.
content.intro:
You’ve been there: 3 AM, a client request comes in, and you realize your local directory is a chaotic mess of 'final_v2_real.js' files. The absence of a robust version control strategy isn't just an annoyance; it is a liability that erodes client trust and threatens your project's integrity every time you deploy to production.

But the era of manual backups is over. By integrating the Antigravity project template, you shift from reactive patching to proactive engineering. This framework forces a disciplined structure onto your workspace, turning your file system into a clean, trackable asset that moves as fast as your ambition.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Create a rigid project structure that enforces versioning at the directory level.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize an Antigravity project workspace with strict Git-flow integration and automated semantic versioning hooks.

steps.title: Configure Atomic Commit Hooks
steps.description: Automate Git snapshots so you never lose progress during iterative AI prompting.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure Husky and lint-staged to enforce atomic commits for every change made via AI agents.

steps.title: Establish the 'Golden Branch' Workflow
steps.description: Protect your production code by mandating feature-branch isolation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Git workflow policy where all AI-generated code must pass a validation suite before merging to main.

steps.title: Inject AI Contextual Awareness
steps.description: Provide Claude Code with the manifest of your project to prevent hallucinated file edits.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a .claude-ignore and project-context.md file that maps the current Antigravity architecture for AI awareness.

steps.title: Deploy the Automated Audit Log
steps.description: Create a changelog generator that summarizes your AI-assisted commits for client transparency.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Integrate a changelog generator that automatically parses Git logs and formats them into a client-facing Markdown report.

pro_tips: Always use the '--dry-run' flag in Claude Code when modifying complex build scripts to verify output before execution.
Map your Antigravity 'hot-swap' folder to a cloud-synced directory to create a secondary, real-time off-site backup.
Use Git tags to mark 'Client Approval' states; this allows you to revert the entire project to a signed-off version in seconds.
Ignore node_modules in your Antigravity template but keep a lock-file snapshot to ensure deterministic dependency environments.
Run 'claude diff' before committing to manually audit the AI's logic, preventing 'dependency creep' in your codebase.
content.next_steps: Once your project is scaffolded, run your first simulation cycle using Claude Code to ensure your commit hooks trigger correctly on file changes.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in the dark. Adopt the industry standard for freelance scalability and secure your reputation with every push. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
